title: Quality pass: clippy pedantic cleanup in crossbridge-server
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Run cargo clippy -p crossbridge-server with -W clippy::pedantic and resolve all 57 warnings (largest count in the workspace). Top categories: cast_possible_truncation, missing_errors_doc, must_use_candidate, uninlined_format_args, unused_async (note: unused_async on run_fake_supervisor is a false positive — the helper hosts a future; allow that one with a comment).

Acceptance criteria:
- cargo clippy -p crossbridge-server --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings exits 0.
- No blanket #[allow] over whole modules — fix the underlying issues; only allow specific lints with a one-line justification.
- All existing tests still pass (cargo test -p crossbridge-server), including the end_to_end and oversized_frame integration tests.
- cargo fmt --check clean.
